column1: # Maple Insight — Country Pre-Arrival Cost Data (US-3.3)
# Medical exam:    IRCC-approved panel physician directory (secure.cic.gc.ca/pp-md/pp-list.aspx).
#                  Where multiple physicians are listed for a country, the HIGHER fee is used
#                  (conservative estimate).  Costs are converted to CAD using the Bank of Canada
# PCC:             Official government police-clearance portals for each country.
#                  Where a range exists, the higher value (including courier/apostille) is used.
# Language test:   IELTS registration fee from IDP/British Council for each country.
#                  France uses TEF Canada (primary test for Francophone EE applicants).
#                  US/Philippines list IELTS as primary; CELPIP noted in provider where applicable.
# isSeeded flag:   false — editorial review must flip to true before engine uses these values

column2: ) to avoid quoting issues in source strings

column6: medicalExamSource
column9: pccSource
column13: languageTestSource
